api_token.description: Leadfeeder API token. Sent as the Authorization header ("Token token=<api_token>"); never logged.

base_url.description: Leadfeeder API base URL override for tests or proxies.

account_id.description: Leadfeeder account id. Required only for the leads, visits, and custom_feeds streams, which are nested under an account.

start_date.description: RFC3339 or yyyy-mm-dd lower bound for the leads/visits date window. When set, end_date (or today) is also required by the Leadfeeder API.

end_date.description: RFC3339 or yyyy-mm-dd upper bound for the leads/visits date window.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
